landing.heroSubtitle: Upload transcripts, CVs, certificates. AI automatically finds 100+ matching schools and predicts your scholarship chances.
landing.problemSubtitle: Over 56,000 Vietnamese students apply abroad each year without knowing their real chances.

blind.title: Blind Applications
blind.desc: Applying to 10-20 schools without knowing which ones truly fit. Wasted time, money, and opportunities.

expensive.title: High Costs
expensive.desc: $50-100 application fee per school. Scholarships are unevenly distributed. Many miss opportunities due to lack of information.

noTool.title: No Tools Available
noTool.desc: No scientific tool to quantify chances. Relying only on gut feelings and inaccurate advice.

landing.solutionSubtitle: One platform. All the information. The right decision.

upload.title: Upload Your Profile
upload.desc: Drag and drop transcripts, CVs, IELTS/SAT certificates. AI extracts information in seconds.

research.title: AI Researches 100+ Schools
research.desc: System searches real-time admission and scholarship data from 100+ top universities worldwide.

predict.title: Scientific Prediction
predict.desc: Using advanced data analysis to calculate acceptance and scholarship probability for each school.

simulate.title: Improvement Simulation
simulate.desc: What if SAT increases by 100 points? See immediately how chances at dream schools improve.

steps.uploadDesc: Drag and drop transcripts, CVs, certificates. Multiple file formats supported.
steps.autoDesc: System extracts information and searches for matching school data.
steps.resultDesc: Get categorized school list: Dream, Target, Safety.
steps.simulateDesc: Adjust factors to see how chances change.
steps.applyDesc: Submit applications to suitable schools with a clear strategy.

landing.teamDesc: Phú Nhuận Builder × SOTA Works — Building AI tools to help Vietnamese students access international education opportunities.
landing.ctaSubtitle: From profile to scholarship prediction in under 1 minute. Completely free.
landing.footer: SOTA StatWorks — From Profile to Scholarship, Fast & Accurate. © 2026

upload.title: Upload Profile
upload.dropzone: Drag and drop files here or click to select
upload.formats: Supported: Excel, CSV, Word, PDF, PowerPoint

chat.title: Profile Analysis
chat.placeholder: Enter a question or let AI analyze automatically...

viewer.title: View Data
viewer.noData: No data yet. Please upload your profile first.
